description.ko: 메마른 대지부터 흐르는 수로까지, 지구 지형의 복잡하고 다양한 패턴을 포착한 컬렉션입니다.
description.en: A collection capturing the intricate and diverse patterns of Earth's topography, from parched landscapes to flowing waterscapes.

prompt: A high-resolution satellite-style macro shot of Earth's surface, featuring a transition between cracked desert mud, swirling turquoise river deltas, and deep volcanic basalt ridges, intricate geological details, cinematic lighting, hyper-realistic textures, 8k resolution.
